chunks.title: The Tent Outside the Camp
chunks.reason: Narrative of God's command to move and Israel's mourning response.

chunks.title: The Tent of Meeting
chunks.reason: Description of the tent's location and the cloud pillar appearing there.

chunks.title: Moses Intercedes for Presence
chunks.reason: Dialogue between Moses and Yahweh regarding the promise of His presence.

chunks.title: Moses Sees God's Back
chunks.reason: Moses' request to see glory and the resulting divine revelation.
